name: Mustard Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sour cream and plain yogurt.
2. Add onion powder and garlic salt to the mixture.
3. Stir in the chopped parsley and Dijon mustard until well mixed.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
5. Serve chilled with meatballs, cocktail sausages, or fresh vegetables if desired.
20 calories per tablespoon.
